sections.paragraph:
fut. יִדְלֹף-

(1) to drop, to drip, used of a house, Ecc 10:18, יִדְלֹף הַבַּיִת “the house drops,” lets in rain through the chinks in the roof.

(2) to shed tears, to weep, used of the eye. Job 16:20, אֶל־אֱלֹוהַּ דָּֽלְפָה עֵינִי “my eye sheds tears to God.” Psa 119:28, דָּֽלְפָה נַפְשִׁי “my soul weeps.” Compare נֶפֶשׁ No. 3. (Aram. id.; Arab. دلف to go slowly, to creep; VII. to be poured out, to flow; comp. דָּבַב). Hence-
